title: Integrated Settlements contextual indicators for 2025 to 2026
body: "Under the Integrated Settlement policy, Greater Manchester Combined Authority and West Midlands Combined Authority are accountable for delivering outcomes agreed in their Integrated Settlement Outcomes Framework, which has been jointly agreed with Government.   Separately, GMCA and WMCA have agreed to track the following metrics to support understanding of a number of areas of shared interest. GMCA and WMCA will not be held accountable for these metrics. "
